coachAM: Your "lock in young with a clear" ambition and "best worker, best seller" drive are fundamentally sabotaged by a broken physical foundation, exemplified by the abysmal sleep and training numbers; you're trying to out-willpower biological limits you're not honoring, leading to the "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness" you confess. The root cause is a catastrophic spiritual-physical disconnect where your drive for external achievement outweighs the disciplined stewardship of your body as a temple, which inevitably collapses your capacity for sustained elite performance and impacts your spiritual resilience. Today, before anything else, block out 9:15 PM in your calendar for a hard stop to all screens and commit to being in bed by 9:30 PM.
